select
distinct
from dbo.ops_order_inventory_rule_config
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_order_inventory_rule_config (order_inventory_rule_config_ID, order_type, order_tag, rule_code, sort, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, order_desc, rule_desc, property_type, dlv_entire ) values (#{orderInventoryRuleConfigId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderTag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ruleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{orderDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ruleDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{propertyType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dlvEntire,jdbcType=CHAR} )

order_tag = #{orderTag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
